headline: OSB GROUP PLC - Transaction in Own Shares
summary: OSB GROUP PLCISIN: GB00BLDRH3609 March 2026 LEI number: 213800ZBKL9BHSL2K459 OSB GROUP PLC (the “Company”) Share Buyback Programme – Transactions in Own Shares The Company announces that on 06 March 2026 it had purchased a total of 94,482 of its ordinary shares of £0.01 each (the "ordinary shares") on the London Stock Exchange, CBOE BXE ,CBOE CXE and Aquis Exchange, through the Company’s broker Jefferies International Limited as detailed below. The repurchased ordinary shares will be cancelled.
